subcodes.first_line: O servants of God and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! His honour Mirza Fadlu'llah hath attained the presence of the Most Great Shrine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان الهی و اماء رحمن جناب آقا میرزا فضل الله بزیارت بقعه کبریاء مشرف
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @growth of the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @martyrs and martyrdom
